content: Also push on git . After that upgrade skills aqure new skills
Yo! Let me check the git status and then upgrade/install skills.

Got uncommitted changes. Let me add all and push, then check the skill registry.

function.name: exec
function.arguments: {"action":"run","command":"cd ~/.picoclaw/data \u0026\u0026 git add -A \u0026\u0026 git commit -m \"Update: config, channels, skills, and workspace files $(date +%Y-%m-%d)\" \u0026\u0026 git push","timeout":60}
